channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump warns of 'communist menace' in July 4th speech
item.description: The president began the 250th anniversary of July 4th with a patriotic speech at Mount Rushmore, warning of a resurgence in communism.

item.title: Disney Celebrates America live updates: Rare look inside Statue of Liberty
item.description: ABC marks America's 250th anniversary with 24 hours of programming called 'Disney Celebrates America.'

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were married Friday at Madison Square Garden in New York City, with hundreds of guests in attendance.

item.title: WATCH: Parties already set sail in Alaska for America's 250th
item.description: Guests aboard the Disney Wonder began celebrating July 4th along the Alaskan coast.
